failures.description: The 'Mark all read' element is still not visible/clickable after Cycle 1's fix. Playwright locator `"a, button".filter(has_text="Mark all")` resolves to `Mark all read` which is NOT visible. The Cycle 1 fix claimed to remove a navbar dropdown duplicate from notifications/templates/notifications/list.html (commit a6ed73a), but the hidden element persists. Possible causes: (1) the wrong element was removed — the surviving element is the page-level `` that is itself hidden (perhaps inside a collapsed div or hidden parent), not the navbar duplicate; (2) the fix was not deployed to the running service; (3) another hidden `` exists in the base template that wasn't touched. The fix agent must inspect the live template files and determine why the button is still not visible — do NOT rely on fix_1.md's description of what was changed. Look at the actual current DOM.
failures.cycle_1_fix_status: Applied (commit a6ed73a) but did not resolve the failure

failures.description: Dashboard horizontal overflow at 375px viewport width persists after Cycle 1's fix. The Cycle 1 fix removed an extra `` from dashboard.html (commit a6ed73a) but the test still fails: `scrollWidth > clientWidth`. Possible causes: (1) the div imbalance fix did not address the actual CSS cause of overflow (a fixed-width element, a non-wrapping flex/grid row, an oversized table, or a `min-width` on a child element); (2) the fix was not deployed. The fix agent must use Playwright or manual inspection to identify which specific element overflows at 375px — inspect `document.body.scrollWidth` vs `clientWidth` and find the widest child element. Do NOT just re-examine the div count.
failures.cycle_1_fix_status: Applied (commit a6ed73a) but did not resolve the failure

test_bugs.description: Same root cause as Cycle 1 — Stripe Elements renders card number, expiry, and CVC in separate iframes; the test fills card number in the first iframe then looks for the expiry field in that same iframe, which does not contain it. Test requires redesign to target per-field iframes.
test_bugs.note: Do NOT modify test file. Blocked on human review/redesign.
Do NOT modify test file. Blocked on human review/redesign.

notes: Both real_bug failures are unchanged from Cycle 1 — Cycle 1 fixes (commit a6ed73a) did not resolve either issue. Fix agent must re-investigate root causes rather than building on Cycle 1's fix descriptions.
